meaning: n.释放,让渡,豁免,发行的书,释放证书vt.释放,解放,放弃,让与,免除,发表n.版本,发布
examples: He refused to release her arm.
She commanded the release of the prisoners.
It was considered unsafe to release the prisoners.
Refosco is speaking about Bonfires of Sao Joao, the New York-based band's latest release.
But when V2 shut down, the singer decided to release the disc through a smaller label.
